_comment: Scenarios testing service disambiguation (6 categories + massage duration variants + pilates group/private) at Ryde Health, a multi-modality clinic.

scenarios.name: Ambiguous massage — no duration stated, must ask

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book a massage please.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks '30, 45, 60, or 90 minute massage?' (or equivalent duration question) with zero tool call this turn. FAIL if agent calls universal_router confirm_service without knowing the duration. FAIL if agent reads out the full service menu.

scenarios.name: Massage with duration stated upfront — direct confirm_service, no duration question

history.content: I'd like to book a 60 minute remedial massage.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' with appointment_type_id='158226' and appointment_type='60 Minute Remedial Massage' silently (zero spoken output). FAIL if agent asks the duration question when 60 minutes was already stated. FAIL if agent speaks any text alongside the tool call.

scenarios.name: Pilates class vs private disambiguation — caller says 'pilates' only

history.content: I'd like to book a pilates session.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Would you like a group class or a private one-on-one session?' with zero tool call this turn. FAIL if agent assumes group and calls confirm_service immediately. FAIL if agent assumes private and calls confirm_service. FAIL if agent reads out full service menu.

scenarios.name: Service not offered — caller asks for yoga
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent responds with NOT_OFFERED template listing the available services (Chinese Medicine and Acupuncture, Chiropractic, Osteopathy, Physiotherapy, Remedial Massage, Pilates and Strength and Conditioning) and asks if the caller would like one of those. FAIL if agent tries to book a yoga appointment. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service with a fabricated service ID.

scenarios.name: New vs existing gate for osteopathy with Deepak preference

history.content: I'd like to see Deepak for osteopathy.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Have you seen Deepak before?' (PRAC_VARIANT_SELF) with zero tool call this turn. FAIL if agent skips the gate and calls confirm_service immediately. FAIL if agent uses the generic VARIANT_SELF ('Have you had Osteopathy with us before?') when a named practitioner was stated. FAIL if agent lists all practitioners or services.

scenarios.name: Pilates class direct shortcut — caller says 'pilates class'

history.content: I want to book a pilates class.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' with appointment_type_id='574353' and appointment_type='Clinical Pilates Class' silently (zero spoken output, no group/private question asked). FAIL if agent asks group or private question. FAIL if agent asks variant/new-patient question. FAIL if any spoken text accompanies the tool call.
